title: But There Came Your Love
html: F I was lost and weary Dm Found in hurt and shame Bb But there came Your love Gm C And washed it all away F How could I respond Dm To such gracious love Bb All I can do is to offer Gm Bb C All I am before Your alter F All I am is Yours forever Bb Oh, my heart will rest in You Gm Lover of my soul Bb C Love that makes me whole ( Bb Dm C ) ( Bb Dm C ) F I was lost and weary Dm Found in hurt and shame Bb But there came Your love Gm C And washed it all away F How could I respond Dm To such gracious love Bb All I can do is to offer Gm Bb C All I am before Your alter F All I am is Yours forever Bb Oh, my heart will rest in You Gm Lover of my soul Bb C Love that makes me whole ( Bb Dm C ) ( Bb Dm C ) Bb Your love has placed a song of redemption Dm C During the night inside my heart Bb Your love has placed a song of redemption Dm C During the night inside my heart Bb Oh Your love, it is stronger than pain Dm C Oh Your love, it is stronger than shame Bb Oh Your love, it is stronger than pain Dm C Oh Your love, it is stronger than shame
